testimonials.name: Ana Mangal, PhD
testimonials.role: Clinical Associate Professor of Information Systems and Business Analytics, Loyola Marymount University
testimonials.highlight: "Beyond her strong analytical skills, Naomi stands out for her reliability, work ethic, and genuine commitment to producing thoughtful, high-quality work."
testimonials.content: “Naomi consistently demonstrated a high level of initiative, professionalism, and accountability in both academic and collaborative environments. She is someone who can be trusted to take ownership of her work, adapt quickly to new challenges, and contribute meaningfully to team efforts. Beyond her strong analytical skills, Naomi stands out for her reliability, work ethic, and genuine commitment to producing thoughtful, high-quality work. I would strongly recommend her for opportunities that value initiative, collaboration, and strong execution.”

testimonials.name: Emily Hawkins, Phd
testimonials.role: Assistant Professor, Director of HHMI Grant
testimonials.highlight: "Her work reflects strong academic preparation, and interest in research and inclusive educational practices."
testimonials.content:
“During her research experience with the Howard Hughes Medical Institute (HHMI) program, Naomi contributed to projects focused on implementing the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) and World Bank Data into introductory statistics courses, supporting curriculum development and data-driven instructional practices.

Naomi was an engaged and committed throughout her involvement, and her 
work reflects strong academic preparation, and interest in research and inclusive educational practices.”

testimonials.name: Data@UCI
testimonials.highlight: “She brought a level of engagement and care to the role that genuinely elevated the experience for our students.”
testimonials.content:
"We had the pleasure of working with Naomi as an external judge for UCI's 2026 Datathon, our 36-hour data science competition. She brought a level of engagement and care to the role that genuinely elevated the experience for our students.

As a Data Analyst and Consultant, she offered the kind of industry perspective that's hard to come by in an academic setting. She sat through every team's presentation and gave students the time and attention their work deserved, which meant a lot in a competition where teams pour 36 hours into building something from scratch.

We're grateful for the time and thoughtfulness Naomi gave to Datathon, and we'd strongly recommend her for any panel, judging role, or advisory opportunity where real industry perspective and genuine engagement with students matter."

testimonials.name: Chiray Koo
testimonials.role: Assistant Director of the Institute for Business Ethics and Sustainability, Loyola Marymount University
testimonials.highlight: "Naomi is excellent at taking leadership and initiative while also knowing her limits and when to ask for clarification or assistance."
testimonials.content:
"I have been very fortunate to have Naomi on my team. She learns quickly and works independently with a minimum of supervision, and more importantly, has the good judgment when implementing complex projects. 

She can see both the small details and the bigger picture, which is why I chose her to co-organize an event on the ethics of AI with two student staffers. With her team, she worked to define the parameters of the evening, recruit expert panelists, create the introduction presentation, and act as co-facilitator for the panel discussion. 

Naomi is excellent at taking leadership and initiative while also knowing her limits and when to ask for clarification or assistance. Naomi brings acumen and intelligence to everything she does, and we are very glad that she has been a member of the institute’s team."

testimonials.name: Jaydee San Pedro
testimonials.highlight: “Naomi has consistently proven to be trustworthy, hardworking, and intelligent.”
testimonials.content:
“Naomi has consistently proven to be trustworthy, hardworking, and intelligent. During our time working together on various projects and deliverables—such as preparing summary reports, managing budget balances, and performing reconciliations—she demonstrated excellent communication skills and time management. She consistently met my expectations and maintained a positive attitude toward her work,  which I greatly appreciate.

I am confident that Naomi will bring the same level of dedication and success to any future endeavors. She would be an excellent addition to any organization.”

testimonials.name: Mimi Donaldson
testimonials.highlight: “Naomi is very smart, organized and efficient.”
testimonials.content: "Naomi is very smart, organized and efficient. She has an insatiable curiosity for knowledge and is open to feedback and unafraid of change.”
